topIssues: Image 6 (autoallow-off): The inactive switch track has extremely low contrast against its parent container, making the toggle boundary nearly invisible.
Image 7 (default, light): The theme toggle button features a solid background plate, creating an inconsistent visual style compared to the adjacent borderless help and leave icons.
fixSuggestions: Increase the background contrast of the inactive switch track in the off-state to clearly define its boundaries.
Remove the background plate from the light-theme toggle button to match the flat, borderless style of neighboring utility icons.
